name: German Apple Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, sugar, and salt.
2. Beat eggs with milk and cream.
3. Add melted butter to the egg mixture.
4. Combine the dry ingredients with the wet ingredients until smooth.
5. Heat a 10-inch skillet over medium heat and brush well with butter.
6. Pour about 3/4 cup of batter into the pan, tipping it so the batter flows evenly over the bottom.
7. When the pancake is set, add a layer of thinly sliced peeled apples and dot with butter.
8. Sprinkle each pancake with cinnamon and sugar.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F for 3 minutes.
10. Fold the pancakes so the apples are inside.
11. Brush the tops with butter, sprinkle with more cinnamon and sugar, and continue baking under the broiler until browned.
12. Makes 6 servings.
Origin: Hearth and Home Companion
Shared by: Sharon Stevens
